name: tpl-support-triage
description: Support Ticket Auto-Triage — classify ticket intent, route refunds through manager approval, draft replies for other intents. Replace approval externalUrl with your internal approval system. Replace refund externalUrl with your payment/ERP refund endpoint.

steps.notifyMsg: Ticket {{ticket_id}} ({{customer_name}}, {{account_tier}}) triaged. Intent: {{steps.classify-ticket.output.intent}}, urgency: {{steps.classify-ticket.output.urgency}}. Refund status: {{steps.process-refund.output.status}}.
